common.ft_tag: We seek opportunities · We deliver solutions

home.title: We float your assets above the complexity.
home.sub: Adjudicated assets and rights assignments, with legal and tax services included. Real estate investing with maximum precision, security and certainty.
home.inv_sub: Acquire below market value and let our team shield every operation end to end.
home.c1_d: Buy the collection rights of a mortgage loan under judicial process. On acquiring it, you take the litigious rights over the property.
home.c1_b: If the process concludes in your favor, you obtain the rights over the property auction for its adjudication.
home.c2_d: Properties obtained by judicial mandate or dation in payment. Ready for direct, immediate sale.
home.c2_b: Prices well below market value for those looking to invest, rent or resell with appreciation.
home.cat_title: A solid portfolio, with legal shielding included
home.cat_sub: See the opportunities available today in the Altiora catalog.
home.vp_sub: We don't sell isolated properties: we connect acquisition, shielding and yield into one flywheel that drives your wealth.
home.vp_1d: We detect adjudicated assets and assignments below market value.
home.vp_2d: Legal and tax included: every operation stays protected and compliant.
home.vp_3d: We turn the opportunity into appreciation and long-term wealth.
home.vp_note: Each area feeds the next. The flywheel spins and your investment floats above the conflict.
home.pa_title: Your investment, transparent in real time
home.pa_sub: Once you register and sign in you can:

catalog.title: Discover your investment opportunity

property.contact_note: An Altiora advisor guides you through the whole process, with legal and tax shielding included.

access.intro: At Altiora we are committed to the highest service standards. Signing in gives you full control over your investment.
access.channels: Our communication channels are at your disposal.
access.no_register: Accounts are created by your Altiora advisor.
access.rate_limited: Too many attempts. Please wait a moment and try again.

portal.hello_agent: Feed and manage Altiora's property database.
portal.hello_investor: Check your balances, documents and talk to your advisor.
portal.hello_admin: Manage portal users and oversee the operation.

portal.st_s: Movements and balances of your investment.
portal.adm_s: Only the administrator creates accounts. No public sign-up.
